title: Patch preflight con verificación segura
wave: Ola 5 — Sandbox, patch/refactor ejecutable y rollback

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-40 agrega un preflight dry-run usando componentes ya aprobados: PatchReviewEngine, PolicyEngine, GitAdapter y SafeSubprocessRunner. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, modelos, UI, sandbox real, patch apply, Git write, refactor execution ni deploy. La allowlist se amplía de forma acotada solo para git apply --check.

pass_criteria: PatchPreflightEngine combines patch review, policy checks and git apply --check.
Applicable patches return PASS without applying changes.
Non-applicable patches return FAIL without applying changes.
SafeSubprocessRunner allowlist contains only git apply --check for patch applicability.
block_criteria: The preflight uses subprocess without SafeSubprocessRunner or allowlist.
Secret-like patches reach apply-check instead of being blocked first.
The sprint enables patch apply, sandbox, ChangeSet, rollback, Git write or deploy.
risks: git apply --check depends on Git availability.
Preflight applicability is not semantic correctness.
Large patches need future limits and timeout tuning.
Patch sandbox and ChangeSet remain future Sprint 41 scope.
